stage_description: Hand-written pilot pairs + Stage B port of extract_zenn.py / extract_adrs.py / build_dataset.py is done; extractor output lives in data/ (gitignored) and is not yet folded into corpus/v0.1.0/train.jsonl. Final train/valid assembly waits for Stage C glossary + thesis + judgment-LLM extractors and Stage D verification.
